Metadata.CommitMsg:
Add TypeScript transformer and update domain service bindings

- Added `spatie/laravel-typescript-transformer` as a dependency in `composer.json`.
- Introduced new command `types:generate` for TypeScript transformation.
- Updated `DomainServiceProvider` to include bindings for various domain services.
- Registered `TypeScriptTransformerServiceProvider` in the application service provider list.
Metadata.Author: Agnis Kulakovs <urods33@gmail.com>
